summary: Tested NEW mobile card limit feature (6 cards per section with 'View All' expand button) and skeleton loading states. All tests PASSED. Mobile correctly shows 6 cards initially with 'View all X items' button that expands to show all items. Desktop shows all cards with NO 'View all' button. Favorites system still works.

mobile_tests_390px.golf_courses_expansion: PASS - Expands from 6 to 16 cards on click
mobile_tests_390px.golf_courses_button_hidden_after_expand: PASS - View All button hidden after expansion
mobile_tests_390px.hotels_expansion: PASS - Expands from 6 to 59 cards on click
mobile_tests_390px.restaurants_expansion: PASS - Expands from 6 to 48 cards on click
mobile_tests_390px.beach_clubs_view_all_button: PASS - 'View all 12 beach clubs' button visible
mobile_tests_390px.beach_clubs_expansion: PASS - Expands from 6 to 12 cards on click
mobile_tests_390px.cafes_bars_view_all_button: PASS - 'View all 36 cafes & bars' button visible
mobile_tests_390px.cafes_bars_expansion: PASS - Expands from 6 to 36 cards on click
mobile_tests_390px.favorites_button_clickable: PASS - Heart icons work on visible cards

skeleton_loading.implementation_correct: PASS - Each section renders CardSkeleton when loading=true
skeleton_loading.mobile_skeleton_count: PASS - Mobile shows 3 skeletons during loading
skeleton_loading.desktop_skeleton_count: PASS - Desktop shows 6 skeletons during loading

critical_code_review_comments: GolfCourses.jsx: Correctly implements MOBILE_LIMIT=6, useIsMobile hook, expanded state, and visibleCourses slice
HotelPartners.jsx: Same pattern correctly implemented with filteredHotels slice
useIsMobile.js: Correctly uses matchMedia for breakpoint detection at 768px
CardSkeleton.jsx: Clean implementation with animate-pulse and bg-stone-200 placeholders

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All mobile card limit and skeleton loading tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested the NEW mobile card limit feature. All sections (golf courses, hotels, restaurants, beach clubs, cafes/bars) correctly show 6 cards on mobile with 'View all X items' button that expands to show all items. Desktop shows all cards with NO View All button. The useIsMobile hook uses 768px breakpoint. CardSkeleton component provides loading states. Cookie consent can be dismissed with 'Accept' button. Use 390x844 for mobile and 1920x1080 for desktop testing. Data-testid patterns: courses-view-all, hotels-view-all, restaurants-view-all, beach-clubs-view-all, cafes-view-all.
